_comment: Address-agnostic standard NFT setApprovalForAll (selector 0xa22cb465) real-tx corpus (Ethereum mainnet, chain 1) — Etherscan, isError=0. The contract (BAYC, 0xbc4ca0...f13d) is NOT in tokens/1, so it decodes ONLY via the address-agnostic selector route (match.address_agnostic=true -> WASM selector_bridge), proving setApprovalForAll is now legible on ANY collection — not just the 2-3 erc721 addresses registered per chain. Body = token/nft_set_approval_for_all{contract=tx.to, spender=operator, approved}. Operator 0x1e00...3c71 is an OpenSea/Seaport conduit.

transactions.intent: setApprovalForAll(conduit, true) on Bored Ape Yacht Club (UNREGISTERED erc721) -> token/nft_set_approval_for_all via the address-agnostic selector route
